chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1531 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.6494/2023 3. For hearing of main case 28-11-2023 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Agha Ather Pathan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant petitioner as according to him case has been disposed of in ‘C’ class which has been accepted by the learned Magistrate concerned. Accordingly this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
